title: OrderStatusEvent
description: A status-change event emitted by the broker for an order. Timestamps are truncated to the second.

order_id.description: Broker-assigned order ID this event belongs to.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp truncated to the second (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

filled_qty.description: Cumulative shares filled at the time of this event.

filled_price.description: Average fill price at the time of this event (USD).
